title: PR Sentinel → JFL integration: write review:findings to jsonl
summary: Updated pr-sentinel.yml to write review:findings events to .jfl/service-events.jsonl after review runs. Removed dead hub POST from jfl-eval.yml. Hub doesn't run in CI — CI writes to jsonl files, commits, hub ingests locally via file watcher on git pull.
detail: Three changes: (1) pr-sentinel.yml gets id on action step, captures review_json/findings_count/action outputs, writes structured review:findings event to .jfl/service-events.jsonl with severity counts and finding summaries, commits + pushes. Uses env vars (not shell interpolation) for safe JSON handling. (2) jfl-eval.yml drops the 'Post eval:scored event to hub' step that tried to curl the hub API — hub doesn't run in CI. Also removed unused JFL_HUB_URL/TOKEN secrets and env vars. (3) Auto-merge gate updated to check both github-actions and github-actions[bot] author logins for PR Sentinel review state.
learned: Hub doesn't run in CI. CI writes to .jfl/*.jsonl files and commits. Hub ingests locally via file watcher when someone pulls.
PR Sentinel outputs review_json, findings_count, action — pass via env vars to avoid shell injection from JSON content

title: PR Sentinel → RL pipeline: full quality signal integration
summary: Updated pr-sentinel action to compute and expose quality_score, model_agreement, and 4 dimension scores (correctness/coverage/architecture/value). Updated jfl-cli workflow to write review:scored events and training tuples with all quality dimensions. Policy head now has 6 new reward signals from adversarial dual-model review.
detail: Two repos changed: (1) hathbanger/pr-sentinel — added computeQualitySignal() to reporter.ts that derives quality_score from severity-weighted penalties (critical=0.25, high=0.15, medium=0.05, low=0.01), model_agreement from critique agreed/disputed ratio, and dimension scores by mapping finding types to dims (bug/security→correctness, test_gap→coverage, architecture→architecture, perf/maintainability→value). All exposed as step outputs + included in review_json v2. Tests pass, dist rebuilt. (2) 402goose/jfl-cli — pr-sentinel.yml now writes: (a) review:scored event to service-events.jsonl with quality_score, model_agreement, dimensions, severity_counts, finding summaries; (b) training tuple to training-buffer.jsonl keyed by PR number with all reward dimensions for policy head join with eval tuple. Also cleaned up jfl-eval.yml: removed dead hub POST, dropped unused secrets, fixed auto-merge gate for github-actions[bot] author.
learned: Dual-model agreement is a richer signal than single-model quality score — when Claude and GPT-4o agree on a finding, confidence is high
Training tuples from different sources (eval vs review) can be joined by PR number at training time — keeps workflows independent
Finding types map cleanly to quality dimensions: bug/security→correctness, test_gap→coverage, architecture→architecture, perf/maintainability→value
